title: H-A2 residual adverse-day analysis
purpose: Pre-register a local-only analysis of why H-A2 still has adverse trade days after deterministic macro/VIX filtering, before buying data, chasing exact 2022 1-minute bars, or running LLM/news research.
hypothesis: If H-A2 is a real macro-conditioned ORB mechanism, residual losing days should cluster around explainable local features such as macro-event subtype, VIX/VXV state, weak opening followthrough, OOS regime, or adverse existing trade-outcome structure. If losses remain broad and unexplained after these local checks, H-A2 should be revised or parked before further exact-data work.
research_question: What explains non-risk losing days and macro-only losing days in the current H-A2 evidence, and should H-A2 be revised, parked, or prioritized for exact replay?

analysis_scope.allowed_input_scope: Use only existing local artifacts already produced by H-A2.19, L.7, baseline trade outcomes, macro calendar, VIX/VXV, and local SPY bars.

planned_tests.question: Are non-risk losing trade days concentrated in a smaller bucket by split, macro type, VIX/VXV state, day-of-week, or proxy direction?
Are macro-only losing days explained by a specific macro-event subtype, weak opening proxy, or OOS regime?
Does the clean/no-risk bucket still contain a repeated failure mode that should narrow or revise H-A2?
Do the observed residual patterns justify revising H-A2, parking H-A2, or prioritizing exact replay?

revise_h_a2_if: Residual adverse days cluster around a clear local feature that can be stated as a narrower falsifiable condition.
The current macro/VIX risk label is too coarse and a more precise condition is needed before exact replay.
park_h_a2_if: Residual adverse days are broad, unstable across chronological split, or dominated by unexplainable OOS losses.
The analysis finds no local feature that improves the mechanism without OOS tuning.
prioritize_exact_replay_if: Residual losses are explainable enough that exact 2022-10 entry/exit replay remains the main remaining blocker.
The analysis preserves the existing directionally coherent H-A2 evidence without adding new fitted filters.

allowed_claims: H-A2 should be revised before further exact-data work.
H-A2 should be parked at E1 until new evidence exists.
H-A2 remains active at E1 and exact replay is still worth prioritizing.
Future H-L1 news or LLM scores must explain adverse days beyond this deterministic baseline.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim H-A2 edge is validated.
Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB entries or exits were tested.
Do not claim E2 acceptance-grade evidence.
Do not claim deterministic macro/VIX evidence is LLM or real-news evidence.
Do not request IBKR bars from this preregistration.
Do not buy new data from this preregistration.
Do not introduce a new provider from this preregistration.
Do not run live LLM calls from this preregistration.
Do not run live GDELT retries from this preregistration.
future_run_completion_criteria: All planned tests are run or marked unavailable with source evidence.
Every analyzed bucket reports sample count and split count.
No new fitted filter is selected using OOS outcomes.
MinTRL/PSR, under-sampled, underpowered, DSR/search-log, and big-day context are reported where applicable.
Conclusion uses one project label: ผ่าน, ไม่ผ่าน, or ยังสรุปไม่ได้.
The next action explicitly chooses revise H-A2, park H-A2, or prioritize exact replay.
tier_blockers: Future run can be E1 diagnostic only unless exact validation data and acceptance gates are added later
